value: I understand how frustrating it must be to wait over a week without your OnePlus 5T—we're sorry you're experiencing this delay. To help get this resolved quickly, could you share your order number and let us know what stage the issue is at (for example, is it stuck in transit, or hasn't shipped yet)? Once we have those details, we'll look into what happened and work toward getting you the product or exploring the right resolution for you.
